<p>• Finance minister to hold key talks with Fund, World Bank officials through April 17<br>• Islamabad to seek safety nets, subsidy reforms, emergency financing options<br>• Oil, gas volatility threatens Pakistan’s reserves, widens current account gap</p>

news.headline: Fuel rates explode as govt withdraws blanket subsidy

news.headline: Trump’s Strait of Hormuz Problem
news.summary: Our White House reporter Zolan Kanno-Youngs parses some of President Trump’s conflicting messages about the war with Iran.
